questions.question: Plumbing ka main role kya hai?

options.B: Water supply aur drainage systems ko install, maintain aur repair karna

questions.explanation: Plumbing ka primary role water supply, drainage aur waste disposal systems ko manage karna hai.

questions.question: Safety ke liye plumber ko kaun sa personal protective equipment (PPE) pehenna chahiye?

options.B: Safety glasses, gloves aur safety shoes

questions.explanation: Safety glasses, gloves aur safety shoes kaam karte waqt injuries se bachane ke liye essential PPE hain.

questions.question: Pipe cutting ke liye common hand tool kaun sa hai?
questions.explanation: Pipe cutter specially pipes ko clean aur straight cut karne ke liye design kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Ek leak ko temporarily seal karne ke liye kis tool ka use kiya ja sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Plumber's putty ya thread seal tape (PTFE tape) chote leaks ko temporarily seal karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Drainage system mein 'trap' ka kya purpose hai?

options.C: Sewer gases ko ghar mein aane se rokna

questions.explanation: Trap mein thoda pani hamesha rehta hai, jo ek seal banata hai aur sewer gases ko ghar mein enter karne se rokta hai.

questions.question: Emergency ki situation mein, sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Kisi bhi major leak ya burst pipe ki situation mein, sabse pehle main water supply band karna zaroori hai taaki damage ko minimize kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Pipes ko tighten ya loosen karne ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Adjustable wrench (spanner) pipes aur fittings ko tighten ya loosen karne ke liye ek versatile tool hai.

questions.question: Domestic plumbing mein kaun sa system 'hot water supply' ke liye use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Geyser ya water heater domestic hot water supply provide karte hain.

questions.question: Kisi bhi plumbing work se pehle area ko saaf aur organize karna kyon important hai?

options.A: Client ko impress karne ke liye
options.B: Safety aur efficiency badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Ek clean aur organized workspace accidents ko rokta hai aur kaam ko faster aur efficient banata hai.

questions.question: Plumbing mein 'PPE' ka full form kya hai?
questions.explanation: PPE ka matlab Personal Protective Equipment hai, jo workers ko hazards se bachata hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko kisi pipe mein blockage remove karna hai, toh aap kis tool ka use kar sakte hain?
questions.explanation: Plunger ya drain snake (auger) blockages ko clear karne ke liye common tools hain.

questions.question: Plumbing system mein 'vent pipe' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Drainage system mein air circulation provide karna

questions.explanation: Vent pipe drainage system mein air pressure maintain karta hai aur traps ko siphon hone se rokta hai.

questions.question: First Aid kit mein kaun si cheez hamesha honi chahiye?
questions.explanation: Bandages aur antiseptic chot lagne par turant treatment ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Plumbing mein 'cross-contamination' kya hai?

options.A: Alag-alag tools ka ek saath use karna
options.B: Fresh water supply ka waste water se mix hona
options.C: Do alag-alag type ke pipes ko jodna
options.D: Ek hi pipe mein hot aur cold water ka flow

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination ek serious hazard hai jahan potable water non-potable water ke contact mein aata hai, causing health risks.

questions.question: Pipes ko measure karne ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Measuring tape pipes ki accurate length determine karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Domestic plumbing mein sabse common pipe material kaun sa hai jo water supply ke liye use hota hai?
questions.explanation: PVC pipes lightweight, corrosion-resistant aur install karne mein easy hote hain, isliye domestic water supply mein bahut common hain.

questions.question: Hot water supply ke liye kaun sa plastic pipe material prefer kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: CPVC pipes high temperatures ko withstand kar sakte hain, isliye hot water supply ke liye suitable hain. PPR bhi ek accha option hai.

questions.question: GI pipes ka full form kya hai?
questions.explanation: GI ka matlab Galvanized Iron hai, jahan steel pipes ko zinc coating di jaati hai corrosion se bachane ke liye.

questions.question: Pipes ko direction change karne ke liye kaun si fitting use hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Elbows pipes ki direction ko 90 ya 45 degrees par change karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Do alag-alag diameter ke pipes ko connect karne ke liye kaun si fitting use hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Reducer fitting do alag-alag size ke pipes ko smoothly connect karta hai.

questions.question: PVC pipes ko join karne ka sabse common method kya hai?
questions.explanation: Solvent cement PVC pipes aur fittings ko chemically weld karke ek strong, leak-proof joint banata hai.

questions.question: Copper pipes ko join karne ke liye kaun sa method prefer kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Soldering ya brazing copper pipes ke liye ek strong aur reliable joint provide karte hain.

questions.question: Ek pipe fitting jo pipe line ko temporary disconnect karne ki facility deti hai, use kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Union fitting ko disconnect karke pipe line ke kisi bhi section ko remove ya replace karna easy ho jata hai.

questions.question: PPR pipes ko join karne ka kya method hai?
questions.explanation: PPR pipes aur fittings ko heat fusion process se join kiya jata hai, jo ek homogeneous aur leak-proof joint banata hai.

questions.question: Threaded pipe joints par leak-proof seal banane ke liye kya use kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: PTFE tape threaded joints par wrap kiya jata hai taaki ek tight aur leak-proof seal ban sake.

questions.question: Ek fitting jo pipe line se branch connection (90 degree par) nikalne ke liye use hoti hai, use kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Tee fitting pipe line se ek right-angle branch connection banane ke liye use hoti hai.

questions.question: Pipes ko permanent end-cap karne ke liye kaun si fitting use hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Cap fitting ek pipe ke end ko permanently seal karne ke liye use hoti hai.

questions.question: PVC aur CPVC pipes ke beech main difference kya hai?
questions.explanation: CPVC pipes PVC ke comparison mein high temperatures ko withstand kar sakte hain, isliye hot water ke liye suitable hain.

questions.question: Pipe ko straight line mein extend karne ke liye kaun si fitting use hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Coupling fitting do pipes ko ek hi line mein connect karne ke liye use hoti hai.

questions.question: Corrosion-resistant metal pipe material kaun sa hai?
questions.explanation: Copper pipes excellent corrosion resistance provide karte hain, jo unhe water supply ke liye ideal banata hai.

questions.question: Drainage systems mein, kaun se pipes generally bade diameter ke hote hain?
questions.explanation: Waste aur soil pipes ko solid aur liquid waste ko carry karna hota hai, isliye unka diameter water supply pipes se bada hota hai.

questions.question: Agar ek pipefitting mein male threads hain, toh usko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Nipple ek short piece of pipe hota hai jiske dono ends par male threads hote hain, ya ek end par male thread ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek valve jo water flow ko completely start ya stop karta hai, use kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Gate valve ko fully open ya fully close position mein use kiya jata hai, flow control ke liye nahi.

questions.question: Pipes ko wall par secure karne ke liye kya use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Clamps aur saddles pipes ko support provide karte hain aur unhe apni jagah par rakhte hain.

questions.question: Kis type ka pipe system leak proof joints ke liye 'O-rings' aur 'gaskets' ka use karta hai?
questions.explanation: Push-fit fittings mein O-rings aur gaskets hote hain jo pipe ko insert karne par ek watertight seal banate hain.

questions.question: Domestic water supply ka primary source kya ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Cities aur towns mein municipal water supply domestic use ke liye treated water provide karti hai.

questions.question: Overhead water tank kis liye use hota hai?

options.A: Waste water collect karne ke liye
options.B: Ghar mein consistent water pressure maintain karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Overhead tank gravity feed system ke through ghar mein pani ka pressure maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Ek device jo water flow ko sirf ek direction mein allow karta hai aur reverse flow ko rokta hai, use kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Check valve backflow ko prevent karta hai, jo water contamination ya pump damage ko rokne ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Water supply line mein water pressure ko regulate karne ke liye kaun sa device use hota hai?
questions.explanation: PRV high incoming water pressure ko safe aur manageable level tak kam karta hai, fixtures ko damage se bachata hai.

questions.question: Water pump ka kya function hai?

options.C: Water ko low elevation se high elevation tak lift karna

questions.explanation: Water pumps mechanical energy use karke pani ko ek jagah se dusri jagah move karte hain, especially upar ki taraf.

questions.question: Ghar ki water supply ko control karne ke liye main shut-off valve kahan laga hota hai?

options.C: Ghar ke bahar, water meter ke paas

questions.explanation: Main shut-off valve emergency mein ya repairs ke liye ghar ki puri water supply ko band karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Water meter ka kya purpose hai?

options.C: Consumed water ki quantity ko measure karna

questions.explanation: Water meter water consumption ko record karta hai, jiske basis par bill generate hota hai.

questions.question: Ek valve jo water flow ko regulate (throttle) karne ke liye use hota hai, use kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Globe valve ko partially open ya close karke flow rate ko control kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Water hammer (pani ka jhatka) kya hai?

options.C: Pipes mein sudden pressure surge jab valve band hota hai

questions.explanation: Water hammer ek loud banging sound hai jo tab aata hai jab pani ka flow suddenly rukta hai, causing a pressure wave.

questions.question: Household water supply system mein air lock ka kya effect hota hai?

options.B: Water flow completely ruk jata hai ya kam ho jata hai

questions.explanation: Air lock pipes mein trapped air hoti hai jo pani ke flow ko obstruct karti hai.

questions.question: Agar ghar mein low water pressure ki problem hai, toh aap sabse pehle kya check karenge?

options.A: Sabhi taps ko open kar denge
options.B: Main shut-off valve fully open hai ya nahi

questions.explanation: Aksar low pressure ka reason partially closed main shut-off valve ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Water supply pipes ko 'potable water' carry karne ke liye kaisa hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Potable water (peene layak pani) ko carry karne wale pipes safe materials se bane hone chahiye jo pani ko contaminate na karein.

questions.question: Booster pump kab use hota hai?

options.A: Jab water pressure bahut high ho
options.B: Jab water pressure bahut low ho
options.D: Jab drainage system mein blockage ho

questions.explanation: Booster pump existing water pressure ko badhata hai, especially un areas mein jahan municipal supply se sufficient pressure nahi milta.

questions.question: Ghar mein pani ki quality check karne ke liye kaun se parameters dekhe jaate hain?
questions.explanation: Water quality ko determine karne ke liye colour, turbidity (gandlapan) aur pH level jaise factors important hain.

questions.question: Water supply system mein 'stopcock' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Pani ka flow control karna ya band karna

questions.explanation: Stopcock ek type ka valve hai jo ek particular fixture ya branch line ki water supply ko control karta hai.

questions.question: Drainage system mein 'P-trap' ka kya function hai?

options.C: Sewer gases ko ghar mein aane se rokna

questions.explanation: P-trap mein thoda pani hamesha rehta hai, jo ek water seal banata hai aur sewer gases ko bathroom ya kitchen mein aane se rokta hai.

questions.question: Drainage pipes ko install karte samay proper 'slope' (gradient) kyon maintain karna zaroori hai?

options.A: Pipes ko aesthetic appeal dene ke liye
options.C: Gravity flow se waste ko efficiently nikalne ke liye
options.D: Pipes ko support dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper slope gravity ki madad se solid aur liquid waste ko drain karta hai aur blockages ko rokta hai.

questions.question: Ek fitting jo drainage system mein 'backflow' of waste water ko prevent karti hai, use kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Backwater valve sewer line se ghar mein waste water ke reverse flow ko rokta hai, especially floods ke dauran.

questions.question: Drainage system mein 'vent pipe' ka ek aur important function kya hai?

options.B: Drainage pipes mein negative pressure (siphonage) ko rokna

questions.explanation: Vent pipe air ko drainage system mein allow karta hai, jo traps ko siphon hone se rokta hai aur proper drainage maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Kitchen sink ke neeche kaun sa trap use hota hai?
questions.explanation: P-trap sabse common trap hai jo sinks aur wash basins ke neeche use hota hai.

questions.question: Bade drainage systems mein, inspection aur maintenance ke liye kaun sa structure use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Manholes aur inspection chambers underground drainage lines ko access karne aur blockages clear karne ke liye provide kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Soil pipe kya carry karta hai?
questions.explanation: Soil pipe toilets se human waste (faeces aur urine) carry karta hai.

questions.question: Waste pipe kya carry karta hai?

options.B: Kitchen sink, wash basin aur shower se used water

questions.explanation: Waste pipe fixtures jaise sinks, basins aur showers se greywater carry karta hai.

questions.question: Drainage pipes mein 'cleanout' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Drainage line ko access karna blockages clear karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cleanout fittings provide kiye jaate hain taaki drain snake ya other tools se blockages clear kiye ja sakein.

questions.question: Floor trap kahan use hota hai?

options.C: Bathroom floor par, pani drain karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Floor trap bathroom ya utility areas mein floor se pani ko drain karta hai aur sewer gases ko rokta hai.

questions.question: Septic tank ka kya function hai?

options.C: Household waste water ko treat aur dispose karna (jahan sewer system nahi hai)

questions.explanation: Septic tank on-site waste water treatment system ka part hai, jo solids ko settle hone deta hai aur liquid effluent ko soil mein soak karta hai.

questions.question: Storm water drainage system ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: Household waste water ko carry karna
options.C: Rainwater aur surface runoff ko collect aur dispose karna

questions.explanation: Storm water drainage system ka purpose hai rainwater ko buildings aur properties se away divert karna taaki flooding na ho.

questions.question: Drainage system mein 'rodding eye' kyon provide kiya jata hai?

options.A: Pipes ko inspect karne ke liye
options.B: Pipes mein rod daal kar blockages clear karne ke liye
options.C: Pipes ko support dene ke liye
options.D: Pipes ko aesthetic look dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Rodding eye ek access point hai jahan se rodding equipment ko drainage pipes mein insert karke blockages ko clear kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Ventilation pipe ki height roof level se kitni honi chahiye?
questions.explanation: Vent pipe ko roof level se sufficient height tak extend karna zaroori hai taaki sewer gases ghar mein na aayein aur fresh air circulate ho sake.

questions.question: Agar drainage pipe mein siphonage ho raha hai, toh iska kya matlab hai?

options.B: Trap seal toot gaya hai aur sewer gas andar aa raha hai
options.D: Pipe mein bahut zyada pani hai

questions.explanation: Siphonage tab hota hai jab drainage system mein negative pressure develop hota hai, jo trap ke pani ko khinch leta hai, causing sewer gas entry.

questions.question: Water closet (WC) install karte samay sabse important consideration kya hai?

options.B: Floor par proper sealing aur level maintain karna

questions.explanation: Proper sealing leaks aur sewer gas entry ko rokta hai, aur leveling stability provide karta hai.

questions.question: Wash basin ko wall par mount karte samay kis type ke fasteners ka use karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Wash basin ka weight support karne ke liye strong aur secure fasteners zaroori hain.

questions.question: Taps (faucets) se pani leak ho raha hai, iska common reason kya ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Worn-out washers aur O-rings sabse common reason hain taps se dripping ya leakage ka.

questions.question: Shower mixer ka kya purpose hai?

options.C: Hot aur cold water ko mix karke desired temperature par supply karna

questions.explanation: Shower mixer user ko hot aur cold water ko adjust karke comfortable temperature par pani lene ki facility deta hai.

questions.question: Geyser (water heater) install karte samay kaun si safety precaution zaroori hai?

options.A: Geyser ko kitchen mein install karna
options.D: Geyser ko bina earthing ke connect karna

questions.explanation: Pressure release valve geyser ke andar excessive pressure build-up ko prevent karta hai, jo ek safety feature hai.

questions.question: Dual-flush WC ka kya advantage hai?

options.B: Water conservation mein madad karta hai
options.D: Sirf cold water se flush karta hai

questions.explanation: Dual-flush WC do flush options provide karta hai - full flush aur half flush, jisse pani ki bachat hoti hai.

questions.question: Kitchen sink ko install karte samay, drain pipe mein kaun sa trap lagana chahiye?
questions.explanation: P-trap kitchen sink ke neeche sewer gases ko rokne ke liye standard hai.

questions.question: Water filter ka kya kaam hai?

options.C: Pani se impurities, sediments aur chemicals remove karna

questions.explanation: Water filter peene ke pani ki quality ko improve karta hai.

questions.question: Commode flush nahi ho raha hai, iska kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.A: Tank mein pani nahi hai ya low hai

questions.explanation: Ye sabhi reasons commode ke flush na hone ka karan ban sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar wash basin drain slow hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?
questions.explanation: Hair, soap scum aur debris P-trap mein collect hokar slow drain ka karan ban sakte hain.

questions.question: Water heater se garam pani nahi aa raha hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Garam pani na aane ke kayi reasons ho sakte hain, electric/gas supply, thermostat, aur heating element ko check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Kitchen faucet se pani drip kar raha hai. Isko repair karne ke liye kaun sa part badalna pad sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Dripping faucets mein aksar worn-out washers ya cartridges ko replace karne se problem solve ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Wall-mounted WC install karte samay, kaun sa support system zaroori hai?
questions.explanation: Wall-mounted WCs ko ek strong concealed frame aur cistern ki zaroorat hoti hai jo unke weight ko support kar sake.

questions.question: Urinal ka primary function kya hai?
questions.explanation: Urinals specifically male urination ke liye design kiye jaate hain, jo water conservation mein bhi madad karte hain.

questions.question: Agar commode ka tank continuously refill ho raha hai, toh kya problem hai?

options.A: Flapper valve leak kar raha hai
options.B: Fill valve continuously pani supply kar raha hai

questions.explanation: Continuous refilling ka matlab hai ki tank se pani leak ho raha hai ya fill valve band nahi ho raha hai.

questions.question: Bath tub install karte samay, kaun si cheez ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Waterproofing aur proper drainage leaks ko prevent karte hain aur bathroom ko damage se bachate hain.

questions.question: Ek 'pillar tap' kahan use hota hai?

options.B: Wash basin ya sink par, jahan do separate holes hote hain hot aur cold water ke liye

questions.explanation: Pillar tap ek single tap hai jo ek hole mein install hota hai, hot aur cold ke liye do alag taps hote hain.

questions.question: Agar wash basin mein pani overflow ho raha hai, toh kaun sa feature use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Overflow hole extra pani ko basin se bahar nikalne deta hai, flooding ko prevent karta hai.

questions.question: Instant water heater (geyser) ko electric supply se connect karte samay kya zaroori hai?
questions.explanation: Earthing aur MCB electrical shocks aur short circuits se safety provide karte hain.

questions.question: Washing machine ke liye water supply connection kaisa hona chahiye?

options.C: Hot aur cold dono water connections (agar machine support karti hai)

questions.explanation: Modern washing machines ko hot aur cold water dono ki zaroorat hoti hai, depending on the wash cycle.

questions.question: Agar ek pipe mein chhota leak hai, toh sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Main water supply band karne se leak ko control kiya ja sakta hai aur further damage roka ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Drain blockage clear karne ke liye chemical drain cleaner ka use karna kitna safe hai?

options.C: Carefully aur instructions ke according use karna chahiye
options.D: Sirf garam pani ke saath use karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Chemical drain cleaners harmful ho sakte hain agar galat tarike se use kiye jaayen. Personal safety aur ventilation ka dhyan rakhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Low water pressure ki problem ko troubleshoot karte samay, sabse pehle kahan check karna chahiye?

options.B: Main shut-off valve aur water meter ke paas

questions.explanation: Main valve ka partially band hona ya water meter mein issue low pressure ka common karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar wash basin ka drain completely blocked hai, toh aap kaun sa tool use karenge?
questions.explanation: Plunger aur drain snake blockages ko physically clear karne ke liye effective tools hain.

questions.question: Geyser se 'banging' sound aa rahi hai, iska kya matlab ho sakta hai?

options.B: Sediment build-up ya mineral deposits tank mein
options.D: Geyser ka colour change ho gaya hai

questions.explanation: Sediment build-up ke upar pani garam hone par trapped air bubbles create hote hain, jo banging sounds ka karan bante hain.

questions.question: Taps se garam pani nahi aa raha hai, toh plumber ko kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Geyser ki electrical/gas supply aur thermostat setting

questions.explanation: Garam pani ki problem directly geyser se related hoti hai, isliye uski functionality check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Water conservation ke liye kaun sa plumbing practice accha hai?

options.B: Low-flow fixtures (e.g., dual-flush WC) install karna
options.D: Garden mein fresh water se zyada pani dena

questions.explanation: Low-flow fixtures pani ki bachat karte hain bina performance compromise kiye.

questions.question: Agar customer unsatisfied hai, toh ek plumber ko kaise respond karna chahiye?

options.B: Customer ki problem ko sunna aur solution provide karna

questions.explanation: Good customer service mein active listening aur effective problem-solving shamil hai.

questions.question: Pipes ko freezing se bachane ke liye kya kar sakte hain?

options.A: Pipes ko garam pani se dhona
options.B: Pipes ko insulation se cover karna

questions.explanation: Insulation pipes ko thand se bachata hai aur pani ko freeze hone se rokta hai, jo pipe burst ka karan ban sakta hai.

questions.question: Toilet flush karne ke baad bhi pani leak ho raha hai, iska kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.A: Flapper valve theek se seal nahi kar raha
options.B: Fill valve continuously pani supply kar raha hai

questions.explanation: Ye sabhi reasons toilet ke tank se bowl mein pani leak hone ka karan ban sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek plumber ko apne tools ki maintenance kyon karni chahiye?

options.A: Tools ko naya dikhane ke liye
options.B: Tools ki lifespan badhane aur safe working condition maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Tools ko sell karne ke liye
options.D: Tools ko display karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Well-maintained tools efficient hote hain, safer hote hain, aur unki lifespan bhi badhti hai.

questions.question: Agar ek tap se pani ka flow bahut kam aa raha hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.C: Stopcock fully open hai ya nahi

questions.explanation: Aerator mein mineral deposits, main supply mein problem ya stopcock ka partially band hona low flow ka karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Plumbing repairs ke baad area ko saaf karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Customer ko khush karne ke liye
options.B: Safety aur hygiene maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Waste materials ko chhupane ke liye
options.D: Kaam ko jaldi khatam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cleanliness safety ko promote karti hai, hygiene maintain karti hai, aur professional image banati hai.

questions.question: Customer ko plumbing issue ke baare mein explain karte samay kis tarah ki language use karni chahiye?

options.C: Customer ko confuse karne wali language

questions.explanation: Customer ko clear aur simple terms mein problem aur solution explain karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Preventive maintenance ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Major breakdowns aur costly repairs ko rokna
options.D: Kaam ko lambe time tak delay karna

questions.explanation: Regular preventive maintenance se choti problems ko bada hone se roka ja sakta hai, jisse time aur paise dono bachte hain.
